hero.subtitle: Just tell AI what you need — a survey, a registration form, a feedback quiz — and get a polished, ready-to-share form in seconds. No dragging, no dropping, no coding.

features.heading: Forms, reinvented with AI
features.subheading: Stop building forms by hand. Let AI handle the structure, logic, and design.

aiGeneration.title: AI Form Generation
aiGeneration.desc: Describe your form in plain English and AI creates it instantly — fields, logic, and layout included.

smartFields.title: Smart Field Suggestions
smartFields.desc: AI understands context and suggests the right field types, validation rules, and conditional logic.

shareEmbed.title: Instant Share & Embed
shareEmbed.desc: Get a shareable link or embed code the moment your form is ready. Collect responses immediately.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Start generating forms with AI
signup.passwordPlaceholder: Min. 8 chars, upper, lower, number, special (@$!%*?&)
signup.successMessage: We've sent a verification link to {email}. Click the link to activate your account.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

signin.title: Welcome back
signin.subtitle: Sign in to your QForms account

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

verifyEmail.successMessage: Your email has been verified. You can sign in now.
verifyEmail.errorMessage: Invalid or expired verification link. Please request a new one.

dashboard.subtitle: Your dashboard is ready. Describe a form and let AI do the rest.
dashboard.emptyDesc: Tell AI what kind of form you need and it will generate the fields, logic, and design for you.

verifyRequired.title: Verify your email
verifyRequired.description: You need to verify your email address before using the platform. We sent a link to your inbox — click it to continue.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved. No worries — head back and create something new.
